title: poa ligulata
intro: Poa ligulata, also known as Blue Fescue, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Poa ligulata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
intro_study: According to "Indian journal of pharmacology", poa ligulata benefits include its ability to decrease nitric oxide and malondialdehyde levels while increasing antioxidant agents in human lymphocytes.
